question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not explicitly list the chapters or main sections of the thesis (e.g., Chapter 1, Chapter 2). It only mentions the topics to be covered within the scope of the research.

question: Description
feedback: The text provides a very brief overview of the research focus (similarity detection in the context of concept maps), but it lacks a description of what each specific section or chapter will contain.

question: Structure
feedback: The general logical flow of the research is somewhat clear, but the structural outline of the thesis (how the work is organized) is missing. A reader cannot determine the overall layout of the document.
